packageRules.description: Freeze this repo's references to its own nix-devshell composite action. The reusable workflows (golang.yml, frontend.yml) can't use a ./ local ref — they run in the caller's checkout — so they pin the same-repo action by SHA. Because this repo ships continuously, every release cuts a new tag Renovate would then chase across every self-reference. Consuming repos still update through their own pin to this repo; a genuine nix-devshell change (its own dependency bumps) is picked up by bumping these pins by hand.
